scripts.dev: lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; rm -rf .next && next dev
scripts.deploy:
npm run build && rsync -az --delete --exclude='public/uploads/' --exclude='start.sh' --exclude='.env' .next/standalone/ root@68.183.183.0:/var/www/mandalay-land/ && rsync -az --delete .next/static/ root@68.183.183.0:/var/www/mandalay-land/.next/static/ && ssh root@68.183.183.0 'cd /var/www/mandalay-land/.next/server && for f in chunks/*.js; do ln -sf "$f" "$(basename $f)" 2>/dev/null; done; printf "#!/bin/bash
set -a
source /var/www/mandalay-land/.env
set +a
exec node /var/www/mandalay-land/server.js
" > /var/www/mandalay-land/start.sh && chmod +x /var/www/mandalay-land/start.sh; pm2 restart all --update-env'
